recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: High Society
recommendations.overview: Two girls from very different social backgrounds discover, at the age of 25, that they had been switched at birth.

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: Interstellar: Nolan's Odyssey
recommendations.overview: A look behind the lens of Christopher Nolan's space epic.

recommendations.title: Cropsey
recommendations.overview: Realizing the urban legend of their youth has actually come true, two filmmakers delve into the mystery surrounding five missing children and the real-life boogeyman linked to their disappearances.

recommendations.title: Cunk on Life
recommendations.overview: Pioneering documentary maker Philomena Cunk returns with her most ambitious quest to date: venturing right up the universe and everything to examine life and existence in an attempt to find out the point of it all. Along the way, she interrogates exp

recommendations.title: Andre the Giant
recommendations.overview: An ambitious and wide-ranging documentary exploring Andre’s upbringing in France, his celebrated career in WWE, and his forays in the entertainment world.

recommendations.title: The Monster Project
recommendations.overview: A group of aspiring filmmakers interview three individuals who claim to be monsters. However, unique incidents start to occur when they start filming.

An on-the-scene documentary following the events of September 11, 2001 from an insider's view, through the lens of two French filmmakers who simply set out to make a movie about a rookie NYC fireman and ended up filming the tragic event that changed
recommendations.director: Jules Naudet, Gédéon Naudet, James Hanlon

recommendations.title: Life in a Day
recommendations.overview: A documentary shot by filmmakers all over the world that serves as a time capsule to show future generations what it was like to be alive on the 24th of July, 2010.
recommendations.director: Jon Haas, Kevin Macdonald, Phil Loarie, Zillah Bowes, Kjell Bismeyer
